description: Fix voice integration - better error handling and connection state checking
steps: 1. Update frontend/components/voice/VoiceMode.tsx to check WebSocket connection state before attempting voice
2. Add better error handling and user feedback when voice fails
3. Ensure SpeechRecognition availability is properly checked before use
acceptance_criteria: Voice mode shows clear error when WebSocket is not connected
Voice mode properly detects browser support for SpeechRecognition
User gets actionable feedback when voice fails
